name: Basic Deflector
effect_text: Reactive. Play only when your ship is attacked. Enters with 3 defense.
flavor_text: Every pilot learns the deflector sigil before they learn their name.

name: Emergency Shield
effect_text: Play only if your Hull Integrity is below 50%. Enters with 3 defense.
flavor_text: Shines brighter when the panel lights say dying. Otherwise just a lamp.

name: Panic Plating
effect_text: Reactive. You may scrap a Drone to play this. Enters with 3 defense.
flavor_text: Welded on during the fight, by hands that forgot how to tremble.

name: Light Shield
effect_text: A small energy shield.
flavor_text: Enough against the first volley. Seldom enough against the second.

name: Deflector Plate
effect_text: Ablative Plating 1. Damage reduced by 1 before hitting HP.
flavor_text: Thin, angled, replaceable, and mostly unremembered on the paperwork afterward.

name: Point Barrier
effect_text: Auto-Repair 1. Heals 1 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Stitches itself closed at night while the ship dreams of flying.

name: Reactive Plate
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 2 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: It breaks loud, the way a kind warning becomes a small insult.

name: Combat Shield
effect_text: A shield with a small return-fire coil.
flavor_text: Bite built into the bulwark. Sometimes that is the trade.

name: Interceptor Wall
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this unit first.
flavor_text: A wall with opinions about the traffic that passes through it.

name: Armor Strip
effect_text: A simple reinforced plating strip.
flavor_text: Paint it once, expect it scratched, remember it saved your life.

name: Cover Panel
effect_text: A mobile plating panel.
flavor_text: Field-removable, field-regrettable, and still bolted when the ship returns.

name: Medium Shield
effect_text: A reliable energy shield.
flavor_text: Standard issue, standard life expectancy, and a standard regret after.

name: Ablative Hull
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Damage reduced by 2 before hitting HP.
flavor_text: Designed to lose itself quietly so the pilot can keep going loudly.

name: Defense Drone Wall
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this unit first.
flavor_text: A row of small bodies waiting politely for the large one.

name: Repair Nanites
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Heals 2 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Tiny hands inside the hull, always working, always quiet.

name: Mirror Panel
effect_text: Reflects 2 damage back to attacker when this is hit.
flavor_text: The light comes in. The light goes out. The pilot does not.

name: Emergency Bulkhead
effect_text: Reinforced Hull. Cannot be destroyed by damage this turn.
flavor_text: Closes once and argues with the breach until the breach gives up.

name: Phase Barrier
effect_text: Evade 30%. 30% chance to negate incoming damage.
flavor_text: Sometimes there. Sometimes not. The statistics are not on your side.

name: Countermeasure Grid
effect_text: Countermeasure 1. Opponent pays +1 energy to target this.
flavor_text: Not invincible. Just expensive to shoot at, and that is frequently enough.

name: Signal Jammer Field
effect_text: Signal Jammer. Negates the first spell targeting this unit.
flavor_text: The comm goes quiet, the targeting goes bad, the pilot swears.

name: Tracking Shield
effect_text: Tracking Array. Can block Skyward Maneuver units.
flavor_text: Points its lenses high. Waits for the ones that think they cannot be seen.

name: Cloaked Barrier
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Cannot be attacked the turn it is deployed.
flavor_text: Appears after the aim, never before, never on time.

name: Reboot Plate
effect_text: Emergency Reboot. First time destroyed, revive with 1 HP.
flavor_text: Dies. Coughs. Stands up. Dies again properly, a turn late.

name: Defense Drone Turret
effect_text: A fixed defensive turret with a return-fire coil.
flavor_text: A shield that forgot it was a shield, but remembered how to bite.

name: Heavy Shield
effect_text: A heavy-duty energy shield.
flavor_text: Thicker than the hull it is mounted on, and far less sentimental.

name: Reinforced Bulwark
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this unit first.
flavor_text: Carries the hit, then the next, then the one it was not supposed to.

name: Fortress Plate
effect_text: A heavy armored plating section.
flavor_text: Built by the same crew who did the gate at Dockyard Nine.

name: Regen Armor
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Heals 2 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Scars first. Healing second. Both happen on the same breath.

name: Adaptive Hull
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Damage reduced by 2 before hitting HP.
flavor_text: Learns the shape of the threat and becomes the wrong shape for it.

name: Last Stand Plate
effect_text: Reinforced Hull. Cannot be destroyed by damage this turn.
flavor_text: The plate the old pilots say they nailed to the wreckage and walked away.

name: Stealth Field
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cannot be targeted by enemy abilities.
flavor_text: Not invisible. Merely unimportant to the targeting computer for a while.

name: Dodge Field
effect_text: Evade 40%. 40% chance to negate incoming damage.
flavor_text: The ship is the dice. You are the thrower, and you are tired.

name: Energy Sink
effect_text: Countermeasure 2. Opponent pays +2 energy to target this.
flavor_text: A sponge for the spells. A tax on the wizard.

name: Tracking Grid
effect_text: Tracking Array. Can block Skyward Maneuver units.
flavor_text: The high attackers learn, slowly, that the sky belongs to both of you.

name: Deflector Dome
effect_text: A wide deflector dome with a small return-fire coil.
flavor_text: Round, mirrored, silent, until the targeting locks and then louder.

name: Shield Node
effect_text: A shield projector node.
flavor_text: The heart of the shield. Easy to remove, difficult to miss.

name: Reinforce Wall
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 3 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: Goes down taking the measurement of whoever put it down.

name: Auxiliary Bulkhead
effect_text: A redundant structural bulkhead.
flavor_text: Installed after the first time. Never removed after the second.

name: Reinforced Plating
effect_text: Heavy reinforced plating.
flavor_text: Two pilots died welding this on during the war. It kept the third alive.

name: Heavy Bulwark
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this unit first.
flavor_text: Carries the fight on its back so the pilot can carry the victory home.

name: Fortress Wall
effect_text: A fortified armor wall.
flavor_text: The weld is older than the ship. It still holds better than the ship.

name: Aegis Barrier
effect_text: Ablative Plating 3. Damage reduced by 3 before hitting HP.
flavor_text: Written in layers. Each one a small promise to the next.

name: Hull Reinforcement
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Heals 3 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Slow hands, patient tools, a hull that refuses to learn the word 'final'.

name: Stealth Barrier
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cannot be targeted by enemy abilities.
flavor_text: Your opponent keeps typing your name, and every time the system blanks it.

name: Phase Wall
effect_text: Evade 50%. 50% chance to negate incoming damage.
flavor_text: Half the time it is there. Half the time the enemy files a complaint.

name: Reboot Bulwark
effect_text: Emergency Reboot. First time destroyed, revive with 1 HP.
flavor_text: Comes back pale and quiet. Nobody asks what it saw on the other side.

name: Countermeasure Array
effect_text: Countermeasure 2. Opponent pays +2 energy to target this.
flavor_text: Takes the enemy's good ideas and turns them into accounting entries.

name: Heavy Fortress
effect_text: A heavily armored defensive installation.
flavor_text: Immobile in spirit, immovable in practice, impolite in conversation.

name: Mega Shield
effect_text: A massive energy shield projector.
flavor_text: Made by engineers who had already lost one ship and preferred not to lose another.

name: Battle Bulwark
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this unit first.
flavor_text: Stands at the gap. Fills the gap. Dies in the gap. Paid in full.

name: Titanic Plating
effect_text: Reinforced Hull. Cannot be destroyed by damage this turn.
flavor_text: The plating the captains argue over, the one they never refuse to mount.

name: Aegis Fortress
effect_text: Ablative Plating 4. Damage reduced by 4 before hitting HP.
flavor_text: Four layers of slow refusal, bolted together by someone who had seen enough.

name: Orbital Fortress
effect_text: A massive orbital defensive installation.
flavor_text: The kind of structure that changes maps by existing in the wrong orbit.

name: Citadel Plating
effect_text: Fortress-grade hull plating.
flavor_text: Named by the shipyards. Named again, quieter, by the pilots who came home.

name: Capital Bulwark
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this unit first.
flavor_text: Mounted on ships whose captains had stopped believing in retreat.

name: Evasive Swerve
effect_text: Reactive. Reduce the next incoming damage this turn by 3.
flavor_text: The stick moves before the thought. The thought thanks the stick later.

name: Barrel Roll
effect_text: Play only if an enemy is attacking you. Dodge the next incoming attack entirely.
flavor_text: Old trick. Old saying. Older grave for the pilots who tried it twice.

name: Emergency Brake
effect_text: Play only if you would take damage. You take no damage this turn; skip your draw.
flavor_text: All the momentum you had becomes all the silence you have.

name: Skip Frame
effect_text: Scrap a Drone. Prevent all damage to your ship this turn.
flavor_text: Somebody else disappears instead. The difference is paperwork.

name: Panic Eject
effect_text: Reactive. Reduce next damage by 2. Lose 1 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: You leave the seat. The seat leaves too. Only one of you comes back.

name: Dive
effect_text: Your next Weapon attack this turn gains Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Nose down, thrust up, prayers unchanged from the last run.

name: Weave
effect_text: Your ship gains Evade 50% this turn.
flavor_text: Left, right, left, right, always the wrong side for the incoming round.

name: Pivot
effect_text: Your next Drone enters play with Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Wing points the other way. Pilot thinks the other way. Enemy wrongly.

name: Feint
effect_text: Target enemy unit must redirect its attack to a different target.
flavor_text: The throat goes left. The knife goes right. Fencing in a vacuum.

name: Combat Roll
effect_text: Ignore the first 2 damage to your ship this turn.
flavor_text: You roll. The world rolls. Only one of you chose to.

name: Flare
effect_text: Disable target enemy unit's abilities next turn.
flavor_text: Small bright lie in the sky. The targeting lens believes it for a moment.

name: Chaff Dump
effect_text: Opponent's next attack against you deals 2 less damage.
flavor_text: A cloud of nothing, and the missile treats it like a sibling.

name: Overthrust
effect_text: Your next Weapon attack this turn deals +2 damage.
flavor_text: The engine complains. The pilot does not listen. The enemy does.

name: Break Line
effect_text: Move one of your Drones out of combat range; it cannot attack or be attacked this turn.
flavor_text: Break formation, keep the drone, lose the plan, finish the fight anyway.

name: Sidewinder
effect_text: Your next attack this turn gains Flanking Fire.
flavor_text: Comes in from where the blind spot used to be, before it stopped being blind.

name: Hard Brake
effect_text: Reactive. Reduce next incoming damage by 5.
flavor_text: The harness does most of the talking. The pilot is politely unconscious.

name: Inverted Dive
effect_text: Your next attack this turn gains Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Upside down, in a place where up and down had already resigned their posts.

name: Evasive Pattern
effect_text: Your ship gains Evade 40% for 2 turns.
flavor_text: You fly a figure the enemy cannot name. That is the whole point.

name: Skyward Burst
effect_text: Your next attack this turn gains Skyward Maneuver.
flavor_text: Climbs out of the fight, looks down at it, adjusts, comes back with purpose.

name: Probe Scan
effect_text: Probe 2. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck and reorder them.
flavor_text: Checks the future. Rearranges it. Does not tell the future it was touched.

name: Tactical Sweep
effect_text: Deep Scan. Choose 1 of 3 random cards from your deck.
flavor_text: A short prayer to the random number generator. It answers in triplicate.

name: Cycle Routine
effect_text: Cycling Protocol. Discard any card to draw 2.
flavor_text: Trade the card you have for the card you need. Two for one. Take it.

name: Adrenal Surge
effect_text: Your next 2 Weapon attacks this turn deal +2 damage each.
flavor_text: The gloves tighten. The eyes narrow. The second shot is suddenly a promise.

name: Evasive Split
effect_text: Target Drone you control gains Evade 50% this turn.
flavor_text: The drone takes the order, folds out of the volley, does not ask why.

name: Counter Flare
effect_text: Negate the next enemy ability that targets a unit you control this turn.
flavor_text: Their spell writes itself on the air. This one erases the margin.

name: Combat Reroute
effect_text: Redirect a pending attack to a different legal target.
flavor_text: The missile is not clever. The pilot, for a moment, is.

name: Vector Cut
effect_text: Your next 2 Weapon attacks this turn gain Priority Fire.
flavor_text: The pilot cuts the fight open along a clean seam, calmly, without apology.

name: Full Evasion
effect_text: Your ship cannot be targeted until your next turn.
flavor_text: A full deletion of your name from the enemy's target list for one breath.

name: Deep Maneuver
effect_text: All Drones you control gain Evade 50% this turn.
flavor_text: One instruction over the wing-comm. Every drone remembers its lessons.

name: Swarm Pattern
effect_text: All Drones you control gain Rapid Launch this turn.
flavor_text: The deck releases. The hangar empties. The enemy notices too late.

name: Tactical Reposition
effect_text: Return target Drone you control to your hand. You may redeploy it this turn for -1 cost.
flavor_text: Pulled back, patched quickly, launched again. A short vacation for a small soul.

name: Force Dodge
effect_text: The next 2 instances of damage to your ship this turn are reduced by 5 each.
flavor_text: Fingers find switches the training manual forgot to list.

name: Ion Dive
effect_text: Your ship gains Phase Drive for 2 turns.
flavor_text: The ship slides out of the page. The reader keeps reading, unaware.

name: Snap Draw
effect_text: Tactical Draw. Draw 2 cards; lose 1 energy.
flavor_text: Grab what the future is offering. Pay the small bill at the door.

name: Archive Pull
effect_text: Archive Recall. Play a copy of a Maneuver from your discard pile.
flavor_text: The good trick twice. The pilot knows it was never really new.

name: Counter Maneuver
effect_text: Negate target enemy attack this turn.
flavor_text: They commit. You cancel. The round is over before it started counting.

name: Combat Vectoring
effect_text: All Weapons you control gain Priority Fire this turn.
flavor_text: One calm sentence over the comm and every gun agrees on the schedule.

name: All-Out Charge
effect_text: All your Weapons attack ready targets immediately.
flavor_text: Throttle past the limit. Paint past the limit. Survive past the limit.

name: Perfect Evasion
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn.
flavor_text: Everything that was supposed to hit you asks for directions instead.

name: Deep Scan Lock
effect_text: Deep Scan. Then apply Tracking Lock to any enemy unit.
flavor_text: The scan finds the name. The lock writes it on the inside of the cockpit.

name: Tactical Overdrive
effect_text: Gain 1 energy. All Weapons you control deal +2 damage this turn.
flavor_text: Dial past the red line. The red line goes home and thinks about its choices.

name: Last Stand Maneuver
effect_text: All your units deal +4 damage this turn; all your units are destroyed at end of turn.
flavor_text: Nobody goes home. Nobody was planning to go home. The fight was always the home.

name: Full Alpha Strike
effect_text: All Weapons you control gain Alpha Strike this turn.
flavor_text: Every gun fires twice. The comm line is quiet by the second pass.

name: Battle Warp
effect_text: All units you control gain Reactive this turn.
flavor_text: Time bends. The fleet finds itself speaking mid-sentence on the opposing turn.

name: Heroic Dive
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn. Deal 5 damage to the attacker.
flavor_text: A pilot leans into the wrong frame. Comes out holding the right answer.
